title: guarianthe × laelioides var. deckeri
intro: Guarianthe × laelioides var. deckeri, also known as Dendrobium deckeri, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Dendrobium deckeri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory conditions.
